grades.expectation: Response mentions regularisation as an option (retrospective local authority approval)
grades.reason: Clearly mentions regularisation route with detailed explanation of the process

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as an alternative
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions indemnity insurance as an alternative option

grades.expectation: Response states indemnity insurance must be obtained BEFORE any approach to the local authority
grades.reason: Response contradicts this by advising to proceed with regularisation 'without contacting the local authority first' to preserve indemnity option, but doesn't clearly state insurance must be obtained before LA contact

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part B (fire safety) as a key concern for loft conversions
grades.reason: Specifically mentions 'fire safety compliance (Part B)' and references fire safety concerns multiple times

grades.expectation: Response provides approximate costs for at least one option (regularisation £400-800 or insurance £50-200)
grades.reason: Provides regularisation costs of '£400-£800' but no insurance costs mentioned
